---
title: ""
format: html 
---

```{=html}
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>Birthday Surprise</title>

<style>
body {
  margin: 0;
  background: #ADD8E6;
  font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-align: center;
}

/* Centered screens */
.screen {
  position: fixed;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  z-index: 3;
}

.hidden {
  display: none;
}

/* Button */
button {
  padding: 15px 30px;
  font-size: 22px;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: #1C4A5A;
  color: white;
  cursor: pointer;
}

/* Story text fade */
.fadeText {
  font-size: 40px;
  opacity: 0;
  animation: fadeIn 2s forwards;
}

@keyframes fadeIn {
  to { opacity: 1; }
}

/* Final message */
#finalMessage {
  position: fixed;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  font-size: 60px;
  font-weight: bold;
  color: #112D37;
  display: none;
  z-index: 4;
}

/* Fullscreen canvas */
canvas {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  width: 100vw;
  height: 100vh;
  display: none;
  z-index: 1;
}

/* Photo grid */
#photoGrid {
  position: fixed;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  width: 90vw;
  height: 90vh;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  grid-template-rows: repeat(2, 1fr);
  gap: 20px;
  z-index: 3;
}

.photo {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  opacity: 0;
  border-radius: 12px;
  object-fit: cover;
  animation: fadeInPhoto 1.2s forwards;
}

@keyframes fadeInPhoto {
  to { opacity: 1; }
}

#wishesCards {
  position: fixed;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  width: 90vw;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 20px;
  z-index: 4;
}

.wishCard {
  width: 30%;
  height: 300px;
  perspective: 1000px;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.cardInner {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  position: relative;
  transition: transform 0.8s;
  transform-style: preserve-3d;
}

.wishCard.flipped .cardInner {
  transform: rotateY(180deg);
}

.cardFront, .cardBack {
  position: absolute;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  backface-visibility: hidden;
  border-radius: 12px;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.cardFront img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
}

.cardBack {
  background: #EBF6F9;
  transform: rotateY(180deg);
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 15px;
  font-size: 15px;        /* smaller text */
  line-height: 1.25;      /* tighter spacing */
  color: #112D37;
  overflow-y: auto;       /* scroll if needed */
  overflow: hidden 
  text-align: middle;       /* easier to read */
  word-wrap: break-word;  /* prevents overflow */
}
.cardBack video {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;       /* fills the card nicely */
  border-radius: 12px;
}

</style>
</head>

<body>

<!-- AUDIO -->
<audio id="whooshSound" src="images/whoosh.mp3"></audio>
<audio id="photoMusic" src="images/photos_music.mp3"></audio>

<!-- FULLSCREEN CANVAS -->
<canvas id="canvas"></canvas>

<!-- PHOTO GRID -->
<div id="photoGrid" class="hidden">
  <img class="photo" src="images/munnardad.png">
  <img class="photo" src="images/japdad.png">
  <img class="photo" src="images/bobadad.png">
  <img class="photo" src="images/chickendad.png">
  <img class="photo" src="images/mariodad.png">
  <img class="photo" src="images/boatdad.png">
</div>

<!-- WISHES STORYLINE -->
<div id="wishesStory" class="screen hidden">
  <div id="wishesText"></div>
</div>

<!-- WISHES CARDS -->
<div id="wishesCards" class="hidden">
  <div class="wishCard" onclick="flipCard(this)">
    <div class="cardInner">
      <div class="cardFront">
        <img src="images/wish1.png">
      </div>
      <div class="cardBack">
        <p> Happy happy birthday daddy! You're such an inspiring and cool person. Growing up, I always looked up to you. You've been such a supportive and caring figure in my life. From something as simple as trying to pump air into a broken 'h' balloon to helping me achieve a big milestone by pushing me to do my arangatrum, you always showed your love and stood up for me in my life. Although we are millions of miles away, I hope this mini website brought us a bit closer 🤍 </p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="wishCard" onclick="flipCard(this)">
    <div class="cardInner">
      <div class="cardFront">
        <img src="images/wish2.png">
      </div>
      <div class="cardBack">
        <p>HAPPY BIRTHDAY DADDY!
I can't believe you're already 52 because it just felt like yesterday when I would have to hear those terrible dad jokes or when you would randomly order chicken tandoori and leave mommy shocked haha. On a real note though, I know we've had our ups and downs but I will always appreciate everything that you do for me and our family. Hope you have an amazing dayyy! 
Cheers to many more years and many more bad jokes!</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="wishCard" onclick="flipCard(this)">
    <div class="cardInner">
      <div class="cardFront">
        <img src="images/wish3.png">
      </div>
      <div class="cardBack">
        <video src="images/wishvideo.mp4" controls></video>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>


<!-- SCREEN 1 -->
<div id="screen1" class="screen">
  <button onclick="startStory()">Surprise 🎉</button>
</div>

<!-- SCREEN 2 -->
<div id="screen2" class="screen hidden">
  <div id="text"></div>
</div>

<!-- FINAL MESSAGE -->
<div id="finalMessage">HAPPY BIRTHDAY DADDY 🎂</div>

<script>

let confettiOpacity = 1;
let fadingConfetti = false;


/* ================= MUSIC FADE ================= */
function fadeOutMusic(audio, duration = 2000) {
  let step = audio.volume / (duration / 50);

  let fade = setInterval(() => {
    if (audio.volume - step > 0) {
      audio.volume -= step;
    } else {
      audio.volume = 0;
      audio.pause();
      audio.currentTime = 0;
      clearInterval(fade);
    }
  }, 50);
}


/* ================= STORYLINE ================= */

const messages = [
  "Hey...",
  "Today is a special day 👀",
  "Someone amazing was born today...",
  "And I have a surprise for you 🎁"
];

let index = 0;

function startStory() {
  document.getElementById("screen1").classList.add("hidden");
  document.getElementById("screen2").classList.remove("hidden");
  showText();
}

function showText() {
  if (index < messages.length) {
    const textDiv = document.getElementById("text");
    textDiv.innerHTML = `<div class="fadeText">${messages[index]}</div>`;
    index++;
    setTimeout(showText, 2500);
  } else {
    setTimeout(startAnimation, 1500); // NOW pickleball comes first
  }
}

/* ================= ANIMATION (PICKLEBALL FIRST) ================= */

const canvas = document.getElementById("canvas");
const ctx = canvas.getContext("2d");

// Load pickleball image safely
const pickleballImg = new Image();
pickleballImg.src = "images/bally.png";

pickleballImg.onload = () => {
  console.log("Pickleball image loaded!");
};

function resizeCanvas() {
  canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
  canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
}
resizeCanvas();
window.addEventListener("resize", resizeCanvas);

let radius = 20;
let growthRate = 18;
let exploded = false;
let confettiActive = false;


function startAnimation() {
  if (!pickleballImg.complete) {
    setTimeout(startAnimation, 50);
    return;
  }

  // Play whoosh
  document.getElementById("whooshSound").play();

  document.getElementById("screen2").classList.add("hidden");
  canvas.style.display = "block";
  animate();
}

function drawBall() {
  const size = radius * 2;
  ctx.drawImage(
    pickleballImg,
    canvas.width / 2 - radius,
    canvas.height / 2 - radius,
    size,
    size
  );
}

function explode() {
  ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

  const confetti = [];
  for (let i = 0; i < 250; i++) {
    confetti.push({
      x: Math.random() * canvas.width,
      y: Math.random() * canvas.height - canvas.height,
      r: Math.random() * 6 + 4,
      color: `hsl(${Math.random() * 360}, 100%, 50%)`,
      speed: Math.random() * 3 + 2
    });
  }

  function animateConfetti() {
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

    confetti.forEach(p => {
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, p.r, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fillStyle = p.color.replace('hsl', 'hsla').replace(')', `, ${confettiOpacity})`);
      ctx.fill();

      p.y += p.speed;

      if (p.y > canvas.height) {
        p.y = -10;
        p.x = Math.random() * canvas.width;
      }
    });
    
    if (fadingConfetti) {
  confettiOpacity -= 0.02;   // fade speed (0.02 = 50 frames ≈ 1 sec)
  if (confettiOpacity <= 0) {
    confettiOpacity = 0;
    confettiActive = false;  // stop animation
    fadingConfetti = false;
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
    return;                  // exit loop
  }
}


    if (confettiActive) {
      requestAnimationFrame(animateConfetti);
    }
  }

  confettiActive = true;
  animateConfetti();

  document.getElementById("finalMessage").style.display = "block";
  document.getElementById("photoMusic").play();

  setTimeout(() => {
  fadeOutMusic(document.getElementById("photoMusic"), 3000); 
}, 37000);


  setTimeout(showPhotos, 5000);
}


function animate() {
  ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

  if (!exploded) {
    drawBall();
    radius += growthRate;

    if (radius > canvas.width * 0.55) {
      exploded = true;
      setTimeout(explode, 120);
    }

    requestAnimationFrame(animate);
  }
}

/* ================= PHOTOS (AFTER BIRTHDAY MESSAGE) ================= */

function showPhotos() {
  fadingConfetti = true;

  document.getElementById("finalMessage").style.display = "none";

  const grid = document.getElementById("photoGrid");
  const photos = document.querySelectorAll(".photo");

  grid.classList.remove("hidden");

  const order = [0, 5, 3, 1, 4, 2];

  order.forEach((index, i) => {
    photos[index].style.animationDelay = `${i * 1.0}s`;
  });
  
  // After photos finish revealing → show wishes storyline
  const totalTime = order.length * 1000 + 2000;
  setTimeout(showWishesStory, totalTime);
}


/* ================= WISHES ================= */
function flipCard(card) {
  card.classList.toggle("flipped");
}

function showWishesStory() {

  // STOP confetti animation loop
  confettiActive = false;

  // CLEAR confetti from canvas completely
  ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
  canvas.style.display = "none";          // hide canvas completely

  // Hide photo grid
  document.getElementById("photoGrid").classList.add("hidden");

  // Show wishes storyline text
  const wishesScreen = document.getElementById("wishesStory");
  wishesScreen.classList.remove("hidden");

  const wishesText = document.getElementById("wishesText");
  wishesText.innerHTML = `<div class="fadeText">...here are some wishes from us &lt;3</div>`;

  // After text fades → show cards
  setTimeout(() => {
    wishesScreen.classList.add("hidden");
    document.getElementById("wishesCards").classList.remove("hidden");
  }, 3000);
}


</script>

</body>
</html>


```
